p.strong: Intel Manual Reference: Durability & Write-Ahead-Log (WAL) Semantics
COMMIT records MUST trigger synchronous buffer flush before acknowledgment.

g.text: 1. COMMIT Record Added to WAL Buffer

g.title: Trigger write() syscall to Kernel Space Page Cache
Wait for hardware to confirm persistence on platter/NAND

ol.li: SRAM/DRAM: Commit record resides in Volatile Log.
Bus Transfer: DMA transfer to block device controller.
Hardware Barrier: Controller ACK received (Fsync return).
Client Notification: Acknowledge only after storage commit.

g.text: 1. COMMIT Record Added to WAL Buffer

ul.li: Race Condition: ACK returned before I/O Completion.
Persistence Gap: Record existed only in volatile DRAM.
Stale State: Client assumes TXN 0xAF32 is safe.
Corruption: Logical database state diverges from physical storage.

div.p: FATAL: RECOVERY FAILED TXN was acknowledged but never reached non-volatile media. Inconsistent State.

g.title: Trigger write() syscall to Kernel Space Page Cache
Wait for hardware to confirm persistence on platter/NAND
